home.title: Fernandez Juan
home.paragraph: Seeking new <0>professional opportunities</0> with <1>challenging</1> projects that promote my <2>professional growth</2>. I'm interested in joining <3>teams</3> where I can <4>apply</4> and <5>enhance</5> my skills as a developer.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: My name is <0>Juan Manuel Fernández</0>, and I’m a <1>full stack developer</1> from Buenos Aires, Argentina.
about.skillsIntro: I’m looking for new opportunities that will allow me to continue growing professionally. My favorite programming languages are <0>Python</0>, <1>C#</1>, and <2>JavaScript</2>.
about.experience: I recently <0>graduated</0> from the Programming Technician program at the National Technological University. Throughout my studies I built projects across different areas — mobile apps, web systems, REST APIs, and an AI-powered interview platform — gaining hands-on experience across the full stack. I also have a <1>B1 level in English</1> and I’m constantly improving.

weatherApp.title: Weather App
weatherApp.description: Weather application developed with JavaScript. It allows you to check the current weather along with additional information. You can also view the hourly forecast and the forecast for the next six days, using multiple APIs.

dealershipManager.title: dealership Manager
dealershipManager.description: Application for managing a car dealership. It allows user, role, and permission validation. Developed in C# with the .NET Framework, it is integrated with a database and unit tests. It is a fully functional application.

pygame.title: Pygame
pygame.description: Game developed in Python using Pygame. It applies object-oriented programming (OOP) and basic artificial intelligence to define enemy behavior. It features three levels with different enemies, offering a challenging and entertaining experience.

blog.title: Blog API
blog.description: Backend for a note-taking application, developed with .NET Core and SQL Server. Data management is handled through Entity Framework Core (EF Core), enabling smooth and secure interaction with domain entities.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.description: Mobile application for restaurant order management, developed with Ionic and Angular. The system streamlines the full order workflow, from order placement to kitchen preparation and delivery, improving operational efficiency and team coordination.

self-service-for-hotel.title: self service for hotel
self-service-for-hotel.description: Hotel self-service application designed to simplify room selection and booking through kiosk-based interaction, reducing wait times and enhancing guest autonomy.

hackathon.title: Hackathon
hackathon.description: AI-powered technical interview simulation platform developed with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. The system evaluates open-ended responses using transformer models, providing semantic analysis, scoring, and personalized feedback for software interview preparation.

PowerType.title: PowerType
PowerType.description: Contributed to an open-source PowerShell autocomplete tool by extending command dictionaries and improving CLI command support, enhancing the developer experience for terminal productivity
